hooks.command: bash -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; script="$root/hooks/session-start.sh"; if [ -f "$script" ]; then bash "$script" codex; else printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"agent-pipeline hook could not find hooks/session-start.sh. Reinstall the pipeline plugin or copy hooks/ into this repo.\"}}\n"; fi'
bash -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; script="$root/hooks/edit-streak.sh"; if [ -f "$script" ]; then bash "$script" codex; fi'
